requirement_topic.en: AGANOR Conformity Assessment Scope for EV Chargers
requirement_topic.zh: AGANOR电动汽车充电桩合格评定适用范围
requirement_topic.zht: AGANOR電動汽車充電樁合格評定適用範圍

summary.en: AGANOR (Agence Gabonaise de Normalisation) is Gabon's national standards body and should be treated as the first stop for standards adoption, product conformity, labelling, and technical-regulation questions. Gabon is a Francophone market and IEC standards are the defensible technical reference for electrical and EVSE equipment. As of 2026-06-14, a single official published mandatory AGANOR product certification or certificate-of-conformity route specifically for EV supply equipment could not be confirmed from official public sources. Exporters should verify the current conformity route, HS code, French labelling, customs documents, radio/telecom modules, and any project-specific requirement with AGANOR, Gabon customs, the importer, ARSEE, SEEG, and a qualified local electrical engineer before shipment.
summary.zh: AGANOR（加蓬标准化机构）是加蓬国家标准机构，应作为标准采用、产品合格评定、标签和技术法规问题的首要核实对象。加蓬属于法语市场，IEC标准是电气和EVSE设备可辩护的技术参考。截至2026年6月14日，未能从公开官方来源确认AGANOR已发布专门适用于电动汽车供电设备的单一强制产品认证或合格证书路径。出口商在发货前应与AGANOR、加蓬海关、进口商、ARSEE、SEEG和合格当地电气工程师核实当前合格评定路径、HS编码、法语标签、海关文件、无线/通信模块及任何项目专项要求。
summary.zht: AGANOR（加彭標準化機構）是加彭國家標準機構，應作為標準採用、產品合格評定、標籤和技術法規問題的首要核實對象。加彭屬於法語市場，IEC標準是電氣和EVSE設備可辯護的技術參考。截至2026年6月14日，未能從公開官方來源確認AGANOR已發布專門適用於電動汽車供電設備的單一強制產品認證或合格證書路徑。出口商在發貨前應與AGANOR、加彭海關、進口商、ARSEE、SEEG和合格當地電氣工程師核實當前合格評定路徑、HS編碼、法語標籤、海關文件、無線/通訊模組及任何項目專項要求。

standards_or_laws: AGANOR — Agence Gabonaise de Normalisation, national standards body
ARSEE — water and electric energy sector regulator
SEEG — national public electricity service provider
IEC 61851, IEC 62196, IEC 61000 series as technical references
Gabon customs and import documentation requirements

summary.en: China-market EV chargers are commonly documented against GB/T 18487.1-2023 and GB/T 20234 connector standards, with CCC applying where the product falls within China mandatory certification scope. China CCC, GB/T reports, and Chinese labels may support engineering review but do not establish Gabon conformity, French labelling compliance, customs clearance, SEEG site acceptance, or AGANOR acceptance.
summary.zh: 中国市场电动汽车充电桩通常依据GB/T 18487.1-2023和GB/T 20234接口标准准备文件；如产品属于中国强制认证范围，则适用CCC。中国CCC、GB/T报告和中文标签可支持工程审查，但不能证明已满足加蓬合格评定、法语标签、海关清关、SEEG站点验收或AGANOR认可。
summary.zht: 中國市場電動汽車充電樁通常依據GB/T 18487.1-2023和GB/T 20234接口標準準備文件；如產品屬於中國強制認證範圍，則適用CCC。中國CCC、GB/T報告和中文標籤可支持工程審查，但不能證明已滿足加彭合格評定、法語標籤、海關清關、SEEG站點驗收或AGANOR認可。

standards_or_laws: China CCC (3C) mandatory certification where in scope

gap.en: Exporters should map the Gabon importer, HS code, charger type, rated voltage and power, radio functions, metering functions, connector accessories, IEC safety and EMC reports, French labelling and manuals, and SEEG site approval documents before claiming Gabon readiness. The absence of a confirmed EVSE-specific AGANOR certification scheme is not a waiver of electrical safety, customs, labelling, grid, or project requirements.
gap.zh: 出口商在宣称充电桩适用于加蓬前，应明确加蓬进口商、HS编码、充电桩类型、额定电压和功率、无线功能、计量功能、接口附件、IEC安全和EMC报告、法语标签和说明书，以及SEEG站点批准文件。未确认AGANOR存在EVSE专项认证制度，并不等于豁免电气安全、海关、标签、电网或项目要求。
gap.zht: 出口商在宣稱充電樁適用於加彭前，應明確加彭進口商、HS編碼、充電樁類型、額定電壓和功率、無線功能、計量功能、接口附件、IEC安全和EMC報告、法語標籤和說明書，以及SEEG站點批准文件。未確認AGANOR存在EVSE專項認證制度，並不等於豁免電氣安全、海關、標籤、電網或項目要求。

mandatory_status.target: Conditional — EVSE-specific mandatory AGANOR certification could not be confirmed from official sources as of 2026-06-14; general electrical safety, customs, French documentation, ARSEE/SEEG, and project requirements remain applicable
mandatory_status.cn: Mandatory or recommended depending on China CCC scope; GB/T evidence is not an AGANOR conformity substitute

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] Do not claim Gabon market access from China CCC or GB/T reports alone. Verify AGANOR conformity expectations, French labelling, customs classification, and ARSEE/SEEG project requirements for the exact charger before shipment.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 不应仅凭中国CCC或GB/T报告宣称满足加蓬市场准入。出货前应核实具体充电桩的AGANOR合格评定预期、法语标签、海关归类和ARSEE/SEEG项目要求。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 不應僅憑中國CCC或GB/T報告宣稱滿足加彭市場准入。出貨前應核實具體充電樁的AGANOR合格評定預期、法語標籤、海關歸類和ARSEE/SEEG項目要求。

requirement_topic.en: Gabon EV Market Context — Extremely Nascent Charging Infrastructure
requirement_topic.zh: 加蓬电动汽车市场背景——充电基础设施极为初级
requirement_topic.zht: 加彭電動汽車市場背景——充電基礎設施極為初級

summary.en: Gabon is an oil-producing economy and, as of 2026, public evidence of a mature 4-wheel EV market or nationwide public charging network is extremely limited. EVSE demand should be treated as nascent and project-specific: diplomatic fleets, hotels, mining or logistics operators, donor-funded pilots, private compounds, or corporate sustainability projects are more plausible than mass-market public charging rollouts. This market context does not reduce compliance obligations; it increases project risk because specifications may be written case by case and local utility capacity must be checked for each site.
summary.zh: 加蓬是产油经济体；截至2026年，关于成熟四轮电动汽车市场或全国公共充电网络的公开证据极为有限。EVSE需求应被视为初级且项目制：外交车队、酒店、矿业或物流运营商、捐助方试点、私人园区或企业可持续发展项目，比大规模公共充电推广更现实。这一市场背景不会降低合规义务；由于规范可能逐项目编写且每个站点均需核实当地电力容量，项目风险反而更高。
summary.zht: 加彭是產油經濟體；截至2026年，關於成熟四輪電動汽車市場或全國公共充電網絡的公開證據極為有限。EVSE需求應被視為初級且項目制：外交車隊、酒店、礦業或物流運營商、捐助方試點、私人園區或企業可持續發展項目，比大規模公共充電推廣更現實。這一市場背景不會降低合規義務；由於規範可能逐項目編寫且每個站點均需核實當地電力容量，項目風險反而更高。

standards_or_laws: Gabon national energy and electricity-sector policy context
ARSEE regulatory oversight for electricity and water sectors
SEEG public electricity service and site capacity constraints
Project-specific donor, fleet, hotel, logistics, or corporate procurement specifications

summary.en: China's EV charging ecosystem operates in a high-volume market with dense EV adoption, mature GB/T connector deployment, established CPOs, and large-scale grid planning. That context does not transfer to Gabon. Chinese exporters should expect small-batch, bespoke projects requiring IEC connectors, French documentation, local utility coordination, humid-climate design, and longer business-development cycles.
summary.zh: 中国电动汽车充电生态运行于高销量市场，具备密集电动汽车保有量、成熟GB/T接口部署、既有充电点运营商和大规模电网规划。该背景不能直接转移至加蓬。中国出口商应预期小批量、定制化项目，需要IEC接口、法语文件、当地电力公司协调、湿热气候设计，以及更长的业务开发周期。
summary.zht: 中國電動汽車充電生態運行於高銷量市場，具備密集電動汽車保有量、成熟GB/T接口部署、既有充電點運營商和大規模電網規劃。該背景不能直接轉移至加彭。中國出口商應預期小批量、定制化項目，需要IEC接口、法語文件、當地電力公司協調、濕熱氣候設計，以及更長的業務開發週期。

standards_or_laws: New Energy Vehicle Industry Development Plan 2021–2035 (China)
China National Development and Reform Commission charging-station policy context

gap.en: The main gap is not only certification but market fit. Exporters should qualify the actual vehicle fleet, site owner, power availability, financing source, maintenance partner, spare-parts plan, payment model, French support capability, and climate rating before pricing Gabon projects. For early pilots, low-power AC or fleet-depot charging with solar-storage support may be more realistic than high-power public DC fast charging.
gap.zh: 主要差距不仅是认证，而是市场匹配。出口商在为加蓬项目报价前，应核实实际车辆车队、场地方、电力可用性、资金来源、维护伙伴、备件计划、支付模式、法语支持能力和气候等级。对于早期试点，低功率交流或配合光储的车队场站充电，可能比高功率公共直流快充更现实。
gap.zht: 主要差距不僅是認證，而是市場匹配。出口商在為加彭項目報價前，應核實實際車輛車隊、場地方、電力可用性、資金來源、維護夥伴、備件計劃、支付模式、法語支持能力和氣候等級。對於早期試點，低功率交流或配合光儲的車隊場站充電，可能比高功率公共直流快充更現實。

mandatory_status.target: Market context — not itself a mandatory product standard; technical, customs, AGANOR, ARSEE/SEEG, and project-specific requirements remain applicable independently
mandatory_status.cn: Policy context only — China EV market scale does not affect Gabon conformity obligations or market feasibility

source.publisher: International Energy Agency — Global EV Outlook 2025

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] Gabon should be treated as an extremely early EV charging market. Exporters should qualify project-specific demand, SEEG site capacity, IEC connector requirements, French support, and humid-climate durability before committing product or inventory.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 加蓬应被视为极早期电动汽车充电市场。出口商在投入产品或库存前，应核实项目专项需求、SEEG站点容量、IEC接口要求、法语支持和高湿气候耐久性。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 加彭應被視為極早期電動汽車充電市場。出口商在投入產品或庫存前，應核實項目專項需求、SEEG站點容量、IEC接口要求、法語支持和高濕氣候耐久性。
